attributes.requirement: Audit formatting is deterministic and unit tested.
attributes.evidence: format_approval_record and format_prepared_call covered by redaction/tools tests.

attributes.requirement: Audit collection is proportional to tool calls in the eight-response loop.
attributes.evidence: ApprovalSession stores one immutable record per evaluated call with no retention beyond the run.

attributes.requirement: Nonverbose performance and output remain compatible.
attributes.evidence: Nonverbose mode emits no audit lines; tool results and final text channels unchanged.

attributes.requirement: Credentials, write content, raw args, and tool results never enter records or events.
attributes.evidence: Allowlisted ApprovalRecord fields and adversarial fixture assertions.

attributes.requirement: Hostile controls and oversized values cannot escape trusted framing.
attributes.evidence: format_approval_record escapes/bounds metadata; tests reject raw ESC and oversized tails.
